info.title: Eight IT Status Ticker API
info.description: Read-only feed aggregating recent IT status notices and security advisories (Cloudflare, CISA, NIST/NVD, Microsoft 365, and threat-intel sources) as shown on the Eight IT homepage ticker. No authentication; cached for 15 minutes.

get.summary: Recent IT status and security advisory headlines

200.description: An array of ticker items, or null when no items are currently available.

source.description: Feed source name, e.g. Cloudflare, CISA, NIST, Microsoft 365.

headline.description: Short advisory or status headline (truncated to ~90 characters).

href.description: Link to the source item or status page.

time.description: Relative time such as 'now', '2h ago', '3d ago', or an ISO date for older items.

cssClass.description: Presentation hint used by the homepage widget.
